RELIC 1
Tap a glowing runestone to draw it into your pouch below. Dim stones are buried beneath others — clear what's on top of them first. Collect three matching runes in your pouch and they banish in a flash of light. Clear every stone in the relic to win. If your pouch overflows, call on your charms to escape the bind.
